# AI Game Dev Arena

AI Game Dev Arena is a live AI-native game development arena where makers use AI tools and Unity-based workflows to build playable game prototypes within a limited time.

## Core Positioning

- Brand: AI Game Dev Arena
- Subtitle: From Player to Developer
- Category: AI game development festival, AI game jam, playable prototype showcase
- Main audiences: AI solution partners, game companies, publishers, VCs, indie game developers, students, creators, developer influencers, game media
- Primary homepage role: partner and AI conference understanding first, participant recruiting later through phase-based CTA changes

## Season 0 Proof

Season 0 was held on May 1, 2026 as a proof-of-format AI game development challenge. Participants built Unity-based playable games in a limited live sprint. The format gained reference value through Unity game development creator content, named developer participation, game-specialized media coverage, and winning playable prototypes.

## Partner Value

AI solution partners can gain real usage context, onboarding feedback, developer VOC, content assets, and case-study material. Game companies, publishers, and VCs can discover AI-native makers and early game prototypes.

## Participant Value

Participants can experience an AI-assisted production workflow, complete playable game prototypes, gain portfolio material, and access showcase opportunities.

## Important Concepts

- AI-native game developer
- Unity MCP workflow
- VARCO 3D / Sound / Voice as potential game content AI partner
- Playable prototype focused challenge
- Creator and media distribution
- Post-event VOC and use-case report

## Public Assets

The homepage uses optimized WebP images and animated WebP clips derived from local Season 0 photos and game videos. Raw high-resolution photos and videos are not served directly.
